{{- $page := .page -}}
{{- $languageOnly := .languageOnly | default false -}}
{{- $currentSite := $page.Site -}}
{{- $primarySite := index (sort $page.Sites "Language.Weight") 0 -}}
{{- $isPrimaryLanguage := eq $currentSite.Language.Lang $primarySite.Language.Lang -}}
{{- $isMultilingual := gt (len $page.Sites) 1 -}}
{{- $isRootLanguageHome := eq $currentSite.Home.Permalink $primarySite.BaseURL -}}
{{- $isGlobal := and (not $languageOnly) $isMultilingual $isPrimaryLanguage $isRootLanguageHome -}}
{{- $scopeSites := slice -}}
{{- if $isGlobal -}}
  {{- range sort $page.Sites "Language.Weight" -}}
    {{- $scopeSites = $scopeSites | append . -}}
  {{- end -}}
{{- else -}}
  {{- $scopeSites = $scopeSites | append $currentSite -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- $metaHome := $currentSite.Home -}}
{{- if $isGlobal -}}{{- $metaHome = $primarySite.Home -}}{{- end -}}
{{- $siteMeta := partial "site-meta.html" $metaHome -}}
{{- $siteDescription := trim (printf "%v" (index $siteMeta "description" | default "")) " \r\n\t" -}}
# {{ $primarySite.Title }}{{ if not $isGlobal }} - {{ $currentSite.Language.LanguageName | default $currentSite.Language.Lang }}{{ end }}
{{- with $siteDescription }}

> {{ . }}
{{- end }}

Canonical site: {{ $primarySite.BaseURL }}
{{- if not $isGlobal }}
Canonical language home: {{ $currentSite.Home.Permalink }}
{{- if $isMultilingual }}
{{- with $primarySite.Home.OutputFormats.Get "LLMS" }}
Global agent index: {{ .Permalink }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- if $isGlobal }}
Sitemap: {{ absURL "sitemap.xml" }}
{{- else if $isMultilingual }}
Sitemap: {{ absURL (printf "%s/sitemap.xml" $currentSite.Language.Lang) }}
{{- else }}
Sitemap: {{ absURL "sitemap.xml" }}
{{- end }}

## Agent Notes

- Canonical human-facing pages are HTML.
{{- if $isGlobal }}
- This global file is a compact directory of language-specific agent indexes.
- Language-specific indexes list pages that opt in with the AGENT_MARKDOWN output format.
{{- else }}
- Agent Markdown mirrors are generated from the same Hugo Markdown source and linked below when available.
- Pages listed here opt in with the AGENT_MARKDOWN output format.
- This language file lists {{ $currentSite.Language.LanguageName | default $currentSite.Language.Lang }} entry points and key content.
{{- end }}

{{ if $isGlobal }}
## Languages
{{ range $site := sort $page.Sites "Language.Weight" }}
{{- $llmsURL := "" -}}
{{- if and (eq $site.Language.Lang $primarySite.Language.Lang) (eq $site.Home.Permalink $primarySite.BaseURL) -}}
  {{- $llmsURL = absURL (printf "%s/llms.txt" $site.Language.Lang) -}}
{{- else -}}
  {{- with $site.Home.OutputFormats.Get "LLMS" -}}{{- $llmsURL = .Permalink -}}{{- end -}}
{{- end }}
- {{ $site.Language.LanguageName | default $site.Language.Lang }}: [Home]({{ $site.Home.Permalink }}){{ with $llmsURL }}, [Agent index]({{ . }}){{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- else }}
## Language

- {{ $currentSite.Language.LanguageName | default $currentSite.Language.Lang }}: [Home]({{ $currentSite.Home.Permalink }})
{{- end }}

{{- if not $isGlobal }}

## Site Entry Points
{{ range $site := $scopeSites }}
{{- $homeDescription := "" -}}
{{- $homeMeta := partial "site-meta.html" $site.Home -}}
{{- with index $homeMeta "description" -}}{{- $homeDescription = trim (printf "%v" .) " \r\n\t" -}}{{- end -}}
{{- $homeLabel := printf "%s Home" ($site.Language.LanguageName | default $site.Language.Lang) }}
- [{{ $homeLabel }}]({{ $site.Home.Permalink }}){{ with $homeDescription }}: {{ . }}{{ end }}
{{- with $site.GetPage "/about" }}
{{- if partial "agent-access/page-index-enabled.html" . }}
{{- $aboutDescription := trim (printf "%v" (.Params.description | default "")) " \r\n\t" -}}
{{- $aboutURL := .Permalink -}}
{{- with .OutputFormats.Get "AGENT_MARKDOWN" -}}{{- $aboutURL = .Permalink -}}{{- end }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ $aboutURL }}){{ with $aboutDescription }}: {{ . }}{{ end }} HTML: {{ .Permalink }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{- $contentPages := slice -}}
{{- $seenContentPages := dict -}}
{{- $seedSites := sort $page.Sites "Language.Weight" -}}
{{- range $site := $seedSites -}}
{{- range where $site.Pages "Kind" "page" -}}
  {{- $entryPage := . -}}
  {{- range .AllTranslations -}}
    {{- if eq .Language.Lang $currentSite.Language.Lang -}}
      {{- $entryPage = . -}}
    {{- end -}}
  {{- end -}}
  {{- if and (eq $entryPage.Language.Lang $currentSite.Language.Lang) (partial "agent-access/page-index-enabled.html" $entryPage) -}}
    {{- $entryKey := $entryPage.Permalink -}}
    {{- if not (index $seenContentPages $entryKey) -}}
      {{- $contentPages = $contentPages | append $entryPage -}}
      {{- $seenContentPages = merge $seenContentPages (dict $entryKey true) -}}
    {{- end -}}
  {{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- if gt (len $contentPages) 0 }}

## Key Content Pages
{{ range sort $contentPages "Lastmod" "desc" }}
{{- $entryPage := . -}}
{{- $description := trim (printf "%v" (.Params.description | default "")) " \r\n\t" -}}
{{- $markdownURL := "" -}}
{{- with .OutputFormats.Get "AGENT_MARKDOWN" -}}{{- $markdownURL = .Permalink -}}{{- end -}}
{{- $targetURL := cond (ne $markdownURL "") $markdownURL .Permalink -}}
{{- $updated := .Lastmod -}}
{{- if le $updated.Unix 0 -}}{{- $updated = .Date -}}{{- end }}
- [{{ .Title }}]({{ $targetURL }}){{ with $description }}: {{ . }}{{ end }} HTML: {{ $entryPage.Permalink }}{{ if gt $updated.Unix 0 }} Updated: {{ $updated.Format "2006-01-02" }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
